example: She is very resourceful and can solve any problem.
zh: 足智多謀的，有解決問題能力的
ja: 機転が利く、資源をうまく活用できる

example: Albert Einstein was a scientific genius.
ja: 天才、非常に優れた才能を持つ人

example: The internet connection is very fast today.
We can stream videos online without downloading.
ja: ストリーミング、データを連続的に送信すること

example: The phone call was breaking up due to poor signal.
ja: 通信が途切れる、音声が途切れ途切れになる

example: She used her communication pad to send a message.
The movie was shown on a big screen.
They worked hard to free the trapped animal.
Be careful when crossing the street.
